name: Marie Curie
one_liner: She transformed science through persistence and courage.

name: Ada Lovelace
one_liner: She imagined a future of computing long before it existed.

name: Michael Faraday
one_liner: He turned curiosity into experiments that changed electricity forever.

name: Nikola Tesla
one_liner: He kept inventing even when recognition was uncertain.

name: Isaac Newton
one_liner: He showed how patient thinking can reveal hidden laws of nature.

name: Galileo Galilei
one_liner: He kept asking questions when the world wanted silence.

name: Albert Einstein
one_liner: He proved imagination and persistence can reshape reality.

name: Charles Darwin
one_liner: He practiced relentless observation until patterns became truth.

name: Louis Pasteur
one_liner: He helped the world see that tiny causes can have enormous effects.

name: Gregor Mendel
one_liner: He quietly counted peas and unlocked the logic of heredity.

name: Rosalind Franklin
one_liner: She let evidence lead the way, even when credit did not.

name: Dorothy Hodgkin
one_liner: She made invisible molecules visible, one structure at a time.

name: Lise Meitner
one_liner: She pursued truth with integrity, even in the darkest times.

name: Chien-Shiung Wu
one_liner: She proved that precision and courage can overturn assumptions.

name: Emmy Noether
one_liner: She revealed deep symmetry in nature through fearless abstraction.

name: Srinivasa Ramanujan
one_liner: He built extraordinary mathematics from almost nothing but determination.

name: Alan Turing
one_liner: He helped invent modern computing by refusing to stop thinking.

name: Grace Hopper
one_liner: She made computers easier to use and inspired generations to try.

name: Katherine Johnson
one_liner: Her calculations helped send humans to space, one equation at a time.

name: Barbara McClintock
one_liner: She stayed with her ideas until the world caught up.

name: Vera Rubin
one_liner: She followed the data and found evidence for an unseen universe.

name: Subrahmanyan Chandrasekhar
one_liner: He pushed through doubt and helped explain how stars live and die.

name: Mary Anning
one_liner: She dug in the cliffs and changed what we know about deep time.

name: Antoine Lavoisier
one_liner: He brought measurement and clarity to chemistry when it needed both.

name: Dmitri Mendeleev
one_liner: He organized chaos into a map of matter that still guides us.

name: Niels Bohr
one_liner: He embraced uncertainty and helped build a new picture of atoms.

name: James Clerk Maxwell
one_liner: He united electricity and magnetism into a single elegant story.

name: Rachel Carson
one_liner: She used science and writing to protect the living world.

name: Jonas Salk
one_liner: He focused on saving lives, not fame, and changed public health.
